name: Tucker Kraft
headline: Ascending Packers tight end is a top-five breakout
body:
Krafts 2025 was a half-season tease: in just 8 games he posted a monster 0.889 EPA per play, a 2.19 yards per route run, and 15.28 yards per reception while turning 44 targets into 32 grabs and 6 touchdowns on 86 percent of snaps. That efficiency built on his 2024 every-down emergence, when he played all 17 games, ran 442 routes, drew a 15.1 percent target share, and finished TE7 with 707 yards, 7 scores, and 113.3 fantasy points.

The lone caveat is durability after the injury-shortened campaign, but the role is locked: he is Jordan Loves clear top tight end with red-zone equity (12 red-zone targets in 8 games). His 10.75 yards after catch per reception and 18.8 percent avoided-tackle rate make him a YAC weapon defenses must account for. If he plays a full slate at 2025 efficiency, he is a fringe top-three TE. Draft him as a weekly starter and one of the best values at the position.
